name: Workers' Comp Process for Slip and Fall in Murray Utah

mainEntity.name: What is the workers' compensation process for a slip and fall injury in Murray Utah?
mainEntity.text: What is the workers' compensation process for a slip and fall injury in Murray Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Murray Utah report your slip and fall injury immediately to your employer using the city's web report tool or Form 122. Your employer files the claim with the Utah state workers' comp insurer within 7 days. Benefits cover medical care lost wages and disability if approved.[6][7]

suggestedAnswer.text: For a slip and fall at work in Murray Utah notify your supervisor right away to avoid claim denial. Use Salt Lake County's secure web report or Form 122 for official filing. Employers must notify the insurer promptly. Expect medical evaluations and potential physical therapy like at local clinics. Consult a workers' comp attorney early as insurers may dispute claims. Benefits include 66 2/3% of average wages up to state max but no pain suffering compensation.[6][7][3]
